docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY KAMISHER, JOEL AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, DOROTHY MARION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, DOROTHY MARION
DEFT FILED REQUEST TO POSTPONE HEARING TO BE SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER. $10.00 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-19-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-26-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NO FURTHER CONTINUANCS WITHOUT HEARING.
PLTFF'S ORDERED CONTC REQUEST FILED;FOLDER UTL/AT 506, TO TRAY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-26-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-30-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-30-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-24-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MEDIATION AGREEMENT REACHED. IF NO APPEARANCES ON 4/24/06, THEN CONTINUE TO 7/17/06 AT 6:30 P.M.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-24-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-17-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO 7/17/06 AT 6:30 P.M. PER ORDER OF THE COURT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, DOROTHY MARION NO APPEARANCE BY ANY PARTY AT PROGRESS REPORT. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, DOROTHY MARION
